subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth: "There is none other God but Me, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed, and He guideth mankind unto His mighty path." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق انه لا اله الا انا العلیم الخبیر و یهدی الناس الی صراطه العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
